message:
feat(fuzz): deterministic regression corpus with trace fingerprints

Add trace fingerprint tracking and regression corpus generation to the fuzz
harness, enabling CI to snapshot and diff minimized failure sets reproducibly
across runs.

New types (src/lab/fuzz.rs):
- FuzzRegressionCase: seed, replay_seed, certificate_hash, trace_fingerprint,
  and stable violation_categories for a single minimized failing run
- FuzzRegressionCorpus: versioned container with base_seed, iteration count,
  and deterministically sorted cases

FuzzFinding now includes trace_fingerprint — computed by running the trace
through normalize_for_replay() then canonicalize::trace_fingerprint(), giving
a stable content-addressed identifier for the failing execution trace
regardless of timing jitter.

FuzzReport::to_regression_corpus() builds the corpus by extracting minimized
seeds (falling back to original seeds), computing stable violation categories
(sorted + deduped), and sorting cases by (replay_seed, seed, fingerprint,
certificate_hash) for deterministic diffing.

New E2E test (tests/replay_e2e_suite.rs):
- schedule_permutation_fuzz_regression_corpus_artifact: runs a 24-iteration
  fuzz campaign with an intentionally unscheduled task, verifies the corpus
  has findings, checks replay seeds are minimized, verifies all cases have
  stable categories, and writes the corpus as a JSON artifact

Re-exports FuzzRegressionCase and FuzzRegressionCorpus from src/lab/mod.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
